functions.name: commandlinecircumference.cli.parse_args
documentation:
Parse the command line arguments. 
If there is an error, print an error message and exit.
Args must be a positive decimal number
Returns the circumference of a circle with the given radius

functions.name: commandlinecircumference.cli.solveCircumference
documentation:
solves the circumfrence from the radius and will give a preset output with both the circumfrence and radius to the main
function to be printed

functions.name: commandlinecircumference.cli.main
documentation:
this function args = sys.argv[1:]  
radius = parse_args(args)
print(solveCircumference(radius))

functions.name: commandlinecircumference.cli.write_to_file
documentation: Writes the circumference to the file 'circumference.txt'. Creates the file if one does not already exist.
